title: Lively Peppery Slovakian Squid Wrap
description: A spicy Slovakian-inspired wrap featuring tender baby squid and crisp pork, finished with fresh herbs and a tangy lime kick.
instructions: Wash and pat dry the pandan leaves, then set aside.
In a skillet, heat sesame oil over medium heat and sear the pork belly slices until browned and crispy, about 3 minutes per side.
Remove pork and set aside; in same skillet, add minced garlic, ginger, and sliced chili, sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the cleaned baby squid to the skillet and stir-fry quickly until just opaque, about 2 minutes.
Return the pork belly to the skillet, pour in soy sauce, add lime juice, and stir to combine, cooking for an additional 1 minute.
Season the mixture with salt and let it rest for 1 minute.
Lay a prepared pandan leaf on a flat surface and spoon a portion of the squid and pork mixture onto the center.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro and julienned cucumber over the filling.
Fold the sides of the leaf over the filling and roll tightly, securing with a toothpick if desired.
Serve immediately or pack for a fresh lunch on the go.
